handlingProcedures: Always work in a well-ventilated area or fume hood.

Never mix reagents directly — apply separately to sample.

handlingProcedures: ONLY handle inside a fume hood.
Never add water to acid — always add acid to water.

Never store in a refrigerator with other chemicals.
